application.name: G-SHARP: Gaussian Splatting for Holographic Anatomical Reconstruction Pipeline
application.description: Real-time surgical scene reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting: DA2 depth, MedSAM3 segmentation, VGGT poses, and GSplat training in a five-phase pipeline.

changelog.0.2.0: Improvements to the pipeline: VGGT poses, DA2 depth, MedSAM3 masks, GSplat training, five-phase pipeline
changelog.0.1.0: Initial Release - Static and Dynamic Gaussian Splatting with Temporal Deformation

third_party.name: VGGT (Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer)
third_party.description: Camera pose and metric depth estimation. Pip-installed at build time.

third_party.name: SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3)
third_party.description: Surgical tool segmentation. Pip-installed at build time.

third_party.name: EndoGaussian / GSplat Training
third_party.description: Gaussian splatting training with deformation network (project page; upstream repo may have moved)

data.name: Surgical Video Frames
data.description: Directory of PNG frames from a surgical video sequence.

hardware.name: NVIDIA GPU
hardware.description: NVIDIA GPU with CUDA 12+ and Vulkan support (e.g. RTX 6000 Ada).

full.description: Full pipeline: Phase 1–5 (DA2+MedSAM3 → VGGT → EndoNeRF → training → live viewer)

train.description: Full pipeline without live viewer (train only, then exit)

render.description: Render only: skip Phase 1–3 and training; run viewer on existing output

verify_train.description: Quick verify: 20 training iters, 5 coarse, headless, no viewer
